tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated chloride, which is likely of minimal clinical significance in the absence of other electrolyte disturbances. Renal function, glucose control, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Overall, laboratory findings are stable and do not indicate acute pathology.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
